line_technical_records.developer_strengths_if_stated: Virgin-hair deposit/lift table on Color Guide
line_technical_records.gray_coverage_rules: N-/NA-/NN- vs Fashion shade mixing by % white (printed table)
line_technical_records.lift_rules: Up to 3 levels virgin hair with 12% (40 vol.); 11/12 HiBlondes series up to 4-5 levels
special_usage_notes: Equalizer System 2.0 + Integrated Protect System (IPS) per product book.
Mix shades A-Mix, P-Mix, VV, RR, KK, GG are intermix additives (Color Continuum ch.7).
line_technical_records.discontinued_status: Active per Goldwell product book / Color Continuum
line_technical_records.source_document: Goldwell Product Book 2018 (Topchic shade grid p.17) + US Color Guide
data_gaps: Shade names not printed per code in extracted PDF grids.

line_technical_records.default_mixing_ratio: 2:1 Colorance Lotion : color (standard); Cover Plus 2:1 Cover Plus Lotion
processing_time_ranges: Up to 25 minutes standard; Express Toning 5 minutes
line_technical_records.gray_coverage_rules: Fashion + N-shade mixing up to 50%; Cover Plus NN up to 75%
special_usage_notes: Mix shades GG, KK, RR, VV, P-Mix; Clear dilutes deposit.
line_technical_records.source_document: Goldwell Color Continuum 2020 (Colorance ch.10 + shared shade matrix p.69)
data_gaps: Express Toning and Gloss Tones named shades not in shared numeric matrix; numeric core palette extracted.
